title: Chapter 2 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 2 concepts!

questions.question: Which explicitly defines a text variable?
questions.explanation: String is the explicit type for text.

questions.question: A variable explicitly declared as `final` can be reassigned multiple times.
questions.explanation: The keyword final specifically locks a variable from reassignment.

questions.question: Which performs String Interpolation?
questions.explanation: Dart utilizes the $ symbol to inject variables inside strings.

questions.question: Variables declared with _____ infer their type automatically based on the provided value.
questions.explanation: var determines the type entirely by itself upon the first assignment.
